positive: Minimalist celestial landscape featuring a crescent moon glowing softly over a stylized constellation map that forms the outline of an ancient, mythical animal (like a griffin or celestial whale). Use thick, clean line art combined with geometric patterns and negative space. The palette should be deep indigo, cosmic teal, and shimmering gold foil effect, suitable for screen printing. High contrast, perfect silhouette, centered composition, isolated graphic art, vector illustration style, suitable for t-shirt printing, highly detailed.
